pred_reason: SWC-101 is applicable due to identified integer overflow risks in arithmetic operations within WadRayMath and InterestMath. SWC-107 is justified as external calls to tokens like ICToken.redeemUnderlying and IERC20.transfer were found without proper reentrancy guards. Evidence: Task 6 finding shows arithmetic overflow risks in WadRayMath/InterestMath; Task 2 finding identifies external calls to potentially reentrant tokens; Task 3 finding notes state change ordering issues before external calls
